privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.p1: We collect the information you provide to deliver the service, including profile details, photos, messages, and usage data.
privacy.p2: We use this data to show matches, improve safety, and personalize your experience. You can request a copy of your data or delete your account at any time.
privacy.p3: We do not sell your personal data. Some data may be shared with trusted vendors for hosting, analytics, and customer support.
privacy.p4: For more details or requests, visit the Data Controls section in Settings.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.p1: Welcome to Shqiponja. By using our services you agree to these Terms. You must be at least 18 years old to use the platform.
terms.p2: You are responsible for your content and interactions. Prohibited content includes harassment, hate, nudity, impersonation, and illegal activity.
terms.p3: We reserve the right to remove content, suspend accounts, or take other actions to keep the community safe.
terms.p4: Subscriptions renew automatically unless canceled. You can manage billing in your account settings.
terms.p5: For support, contact us via the Help Center in Settings.
